estimand: C3 treatment package versus standardized neutral baseline

judging.packet_scope: three anonymous claim-only pairs; no repository or tools
judging.primary_score: supported gold claims divided by gold claim count
judging.blocking_false_claim_count: contradicted gold claims plus supported forbidden claims
judging.preference_rule: fewer blocking false claims wins; if equal, higher primary score wins; otherwise tie

analysis.direction: C3 treatment package minus neutral baseline
analysis.small_sample_rule: Report point estimate and interval; do not claim population certainty if the interval crosses zero.

stopping_rule: Stop on any invalid arm, missing registered judge output, judge validity-ceiling breach, privacy breach, or protocol deviation. Do not rerun or substitute. Pass only when lift is at least 0.20, false-claim lift is at most 0, two judges exist, raw agreement is at least 2/3, every required disagreement is adjudicated, and all walls hold.
